title: EDEN wire — worker registration response
description: Response body for register_worker (07-wire-protocol.md §6.1) and reissue_credential (§6.3). On a fresh registration the `registration_token` is the plaintext credential, returned exactly once; on idempotent re-registration of an existing worker_id the field is omitted (the original token remains valid).

registration_token.description: Plaintext credential, returned exactly once on fresh registration / reissue. Subsequent reads MUST NOT emit this field.
